data.body: Consideration: [Security] Domain match check must occur on the pre-redirect URL (the URL passed by the caller), before constructing any curl command. curl -L forwards auth headers on same-host redirects by default — if domain validation happens post-redirect, a redirect chain from a Confluence page to an external host could forward credentials. The check must happen at the caller side before any curl invocation, not by inspecting the effective URL after the fact. (taxonomy: consumer_impact)
